problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: The key to Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? is Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI — specifically Default mode network — which would help 12,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
